input_description: Sequence of 30 frames of MediaPipe hand landmarks. Shape: [1, 30, 126]. Each frame has 126 features: 21 landmarks x 3 coords x 2 hands. Normalization: wrist-centered + scaled by max pairwise distance per hand. Zero-pad second hand if only one hand detected.
output_description: Raw logits for each gesture class. Apply softmax to get probabilities. Use argmax to get predicted class index.

preprocessing.normalization: wrist-centered + scale by max landmark distance
